reason: This is a common Islamic prayer/supplication asking for ease, wealth, safety and happiness. It contains no extremist content or ISIS-related messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
original_post: اللهم إنا نسألك يسرا ليس بعده عسر وغنى ليس بعده فقر وأمنا ليس بعده خوف وسعادة ليس بعدها شقاء - via - 382
